prose: The Fukui nucleophilic attack index on furans was computed at the B3LYP / def2-TZVP level of theory within a GDF (tier 'standard') in the gas phase. The geometry was taken from the provided xyz file. The computed Fukui index (f+) at the most electrophilic site is approximately 0.62390. Note that the engine encountered a warning regarding charge conservation drift, which may indicate small convergence issues.
